title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Indian Oil Corporation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Indian Oil Corporation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Indian Oil Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indian Oil Corporation:
Indian Oil Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indian Oil Corporation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
